reasoning: The Wikipedia page "FIDE rankings" tracks the official ratings published by FIDE, which are updated exclusively on the 1st of each month. The section for Top Women clearly states "The top 20 female players were ranked on 1 March 2026 as follows:" and includes a hardcoded table with her rating at 2472. Since official FIDE ratings for a given month do not change mid-month, and Wikipedia editors only update this page to reflect the new official lists released at the start of each month, the rating listed for Nino Batsiashvili will remain 2472 between 2026-03-15 and 2026-03-22. A 25-point (+1%) increase reflected on this specific Wikipedia page over this specific mid-month 7-day period is therefore virtually impossible.
